tasks.label: git-commit-push
tasks.command: git add . && git commit -m "add github oauth persistence and upload middleware" && git push origin main

tasks.label: git-commit-push-2
tasks.command: git add package.json package-lock.json src/server.js src/config/passport.js src/routes/github.routes.js src/middlewares/upload.middleware.js src/services/job.service.js src/services/user.service.js && git commit -m oauth-persistence-upload && git push origin main

tasks.label: git-status-check
tasks.command: git status --short --branch && git log --oneline -n 1 && git push origin main
